---
title: "Raport_Trump_2026"
author: "Piotr Krzeminski"
date: "19.03.2026"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(SentimentAnalysis)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggthemes)
library(tidyverse)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Wczytanie danych

```{r}
# Wczytanie pliku
text <- readLines(file.choose(), encoding = "UTF-8")

# Analiza sentymentu
sentiment <- analyzeSentiment(text)
```

# Słownik GI

```{r}
data(DictionaryGI)

sentimentGI <- convertToDirection(sentiment$SentimentGI)

df_GI <- data.frame(index = seq_along(sentimentGI),
                    value = sentimentGI,
                    Dictionary = "GI")

df_GI <- na.omit(df_GI)

ggplot(df_GI, aes(x = value)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "green", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Sentyment (GI)", x = "Sentyment", y = "Liczba") +
  theme_bw()
```

# Słownik HE

```{r}
data(DictionaryHE)

sentimentHE <- convertToDirection(sentiment$SentimentHE)

df_HE <- data.frame(index = seq_along(sentimentHE),
                    value = sentimentHE,
                    Dictionary = "HE")

df_HE <- na.omit(df_HE)

ggplot(df_HE, aes(x = value)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "blue", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Sentyment (HE)", x = "Sentyment", y = "Liczba") +
  theme_bw()
```

# Słownik LM

```{r}
data(DictionaryLM)

sentimentLM <- convertToDirection(sentiment$SentimentLM)

df_LM <- data.frame(index = seq_along(sentimentLM),
                    value = sentimentLM,
                    Dictionary = "LM")

df_LM <- na.omit(df_LM)

ggplot(df_LM, aes(x = value)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "orange", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Sentyment (LM)", x = "Sentyment", y = "Liczba") +
  theme_bw()
```

# Słownik QDAP

```{r}
qdap <- loadDictionaryQDAP()

sentimentQDAP <- convertToDirection(sentiment$SentimentQDAP)

df_QDAP <- data.frame(index = seq_along(sentimentQDAP),
                      value = sentimentQDAP,
                      Dictionary = "QDAP")

df_QDAP <- na.omit(df_QDAP)

ggplot(df_QDAP, aes(x = value)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "red", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Sentyment (QDAP)", x = "Sentyment", y = "Liczba") +
  theme_bw()
```

# Porównanie słowników

```{r}
df_all <- bind_rows(df_GI, df_HE, df_LM, df_QDAP)

ggplot(df_all, aes(x = value, fill = Dictionary)) +
  geom_bar(alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Porównanie sentymentu",
       x = "Sentyment",
       y = "Liczba") +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~Dictionary)
```

# Sentyment w czasie

```{r}
df_time <- data.frame(
  sentence = 1:length(sentiment[,1]),
  GI = sentiment$SentimentGI,
  HE = sentiment$SentimentHE,
  LM = sentiment$SentimentLM,
  QDAP = sentiment$SentimentQDAP
)

df_time <- df_time[complete.cases(df_time), ]

ggplot(df_time, aes(x = sentence)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = GI), color = "green") +
  geom_line(aes(y = HE), color = "blue") +
  geom_line(aes(y = LM), color = "orange") +
  geom_line(aes(y = QDAP), color = "red") +
  theme_gdocs() +
  labs(title = "Zmiana sentymentu w czasie",
       x = "Zdania",
       y = "Sentyment")
```

# Wygładzony trend

```{r}
ggplot(df_time, aes(x = sentence)) +
  geom_smooth(aes(y = GI), color = "green") +
  geom_smooth(aes(y = HE), color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(aes(y = LM), color = "orange") +
  geom_smooth(aes(y = QDAP), color = "red") +
  theme_gdocs() +
  labs(title = "Trend sentymentu",
       x = "Zdania",
       y = "Sentyment")
```
